data.description: AgiBot World Colosseo: A Large-scale Manipulation Platform for Scalable and Intelligent Embodied Systems cites or references MetaWorld-X: Hierarchical World Modeling via VLM-Orchestrated Experts for Humanoid Loco-Manipulation.

MetaWorld-X: Hierarchical World Modeling via VLM-Orchestrated Experts for Humanoid Loco-Manipulation cites or references Humanoid Whole-Body Manipulation via Active Spatial Brain and Generalizable Action Cerebellum.

Drive-WM: Driving into the Future: Multiview Visual Forecasting and Planning with World Model for Autonomous Driving cites or references MetaWorld-X: Hierarchical World Modeling via VLM-Orchestrated Experts for Humanoid Loco-Manipulation.
MetaWorld-X: Hierarchical World Modeling via VLM-Orchestrated Experts for Humanoid Loco-Manipulation mentions Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO).
